div.t: Please enter a valid donation amount.
Please select a valid payment method.
Please select how you would like to pay.
The saved payment method could not be used. Please choose another option.
Please select a valid donation category.
Please select a valid donation schedule.
Please choose a start date for your recurring donation.
Please enter a valid start date.
This payment provider is not configured with any payment methods. Please contact the site administrator.
We could not process your payment. Please try again or pick another payment method.
Payment was cancelled. You can try again below.
Please enable JavaScript to pay with this provider, or choose another payment method.
Please complete card payment using the Donate Now button (do not refresh during checkout).
Card payments are not configured yet. Please add a Helcim.js token on the Helcim payment provider, or choose ACH.

form.name: helcimForm
form.t-att-data-partner-country: user.partner_id.country_id.code if not user._is_public() and user.partner_id.country_id else 'US'

div.label: First charge date *
div.small: If you choose today, your donation is charged when you click Donate Now and the next charge follows your schedule. For a future date, your payment method is saved now and the first charge happens on that date.

textarea.name: purpose
textarea.placeholder: Share why you're donating or leave a message...

input.name: payment_method
input.t-att-data-picker-icon: 'credit-card' if pm.code == 'card' else 'university' if pm.code == 'ach_direct_debit' else 'bank'
input.t-att-checked: 'checked' if (not payment_tokens and option_index == 0) else None

div.label: How would you like to pay?

i.t-attf-class: fa fa-#{ 'credit-card' if pm.code == 'card' else 'university' if pm.code == 'ach_direct_debit' else 'bank' } text-muted

button.class: btn btn-link btn-sm ps-0 mt-2 d-none

div.p: No payment methods are available. Please contact us.

div.label: I'd like to cover processing fees (%)

input.t-att-value: user.partner_id.name if not user._is_public() else None
user.partner_id.street if not user._is_public() else None
user.partner_id.zip if not user._is_public() else None

div.p: Card details are sent securely from your browser to Helcim (not through this server).

input.name: helcim_card_holder_name
input.t-att-value: user.partner_id.name if not user._is_public() else None

input.name: helcim_bank_account_holder
input.t-att-value: user.partner_id.name if not user._is_public() else None

input.name: helcim_bank_street
input.t-att-value: user.partner_id.street if not user._is_public() else None

input.name: helcim_bank_city
input.t-att-value: user.partner_id.city if not user._is_public() else None

input.name: helcim_bank_state
input.t-att-value: user.partner_id.state_id.code if not user._is_public() and user.partner_id.state_id else None

input.name: helcim_bank_zip
input.t-att-value: user.partner_id.zip if not user._is_public() else None

div.label: Save this payment method for future donations

div.p: Your donation is secure and processed through our trusted payment partners.
Please wait while we redirect you to the payment provider…

t.p: This is the test payment provider. Choose a simulated outcome, then confirm.
Opening the secure Helcim payment window…

t.t-if: not redirect_form_html and not demo_direct and not helcim_pay_autostart
t.div: Payment could not be started for this provider configuration. Please try another payment method or contact support.

t.small: Test mode — find this under Payments → Test Transactions in Helcim.
